The CEREC (Computer-Eassis Red/Cam/Education/Chairside) system uses CAD technology to create precise dental restorations. The specific method involves capturing an intraoral scan with either optical imaging or laser scanning, then designing the restoration on software before milling it out from a block of ceramic material.
